reasoning: Inspected at 8x zoom. Pixel art style masks many standard AI tells, but several concerns remain. (1) The horizontal decorative top bar (dark teal/green strip) shows non-uniform dash spacing — some dashes appear 2px wide, others 1px, inconsistent for hand-crafted pixel art. (2) The gold border frame uses a subtle luminosity gradient across its width rather than strict 2-3 hard tone steps; this gradient banding is a generation artifact. (3) The central oval/pill element has irregular pixel stepping on its curves — Bresenham-correct circles produce a predictable staircase; this oval deviates from that, suggesting synthesized geometry. (4) Minor color halo bleed (1-2 stray pixels of blue) visible around the top-center gem corner ornament. (5) Outer card edge against the dark background shows faint anti-aliasing smear at several corners — not expected in true pixel art rendered without AA. Small icons (cassette, face) are too small at source resolution to judge critically. Overall construction is deliberate and palette is restrained, keeping this from a fail, but the pattern inconsistencies and gradient frame shading are clear AI generation tells.
